content:
Generally, Pollux is flexible and can run with any of them or one of them, or two.
Saya can only provide corrosion and his posse (bleeding heart) can somewhat offset the discard-redraw stuff, technically she won't much onto the table beside corrosion apply and buff a wee bit to his exalt dps (which isn't really too important as his angri birb talent is his biggest buffer).
Horla (e1 ideally ofc) both buff and debuff which is nice.
Thais is Thais no question.

My comp:
- Pollux + Thais/Horla/Clem (skey bot) + Arachne + Castor/Salvador/utility really
- (rare use) Pollux + Arachne + Tawil (skey bot + support) + flex, pretty much ultrawil but pretty headache to run well. Suboptimal, don't copy this.
Recommend moving Myriam's story before chapter 6, gives you great context to the villain and why she crazy
Part 3 tomorrow. All done but need finish all. I'm so lazy. Forgive me <:Horla_cry:1357186646294138890>
